subcodes.first_line: O servant of Baha! The Abha Beauty was the light of all horizons and the Sun of Truth shed its radiance, yet a thousand times alas that souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء جمال ابهی روشنی آفاق بود و شمس حقیقت اشراق ولی هزار افسوس که نفوس
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @thankfulness; gratitude
